_note: Fixture data ported from Assembly's backend/internal/color/oklch_test.go. Tolerances follow Go's ±1.5 byte tolerance from TestRoundTripHex, loosened to ±2 here because Math.cbrt/pow are implementation-defined in JS.

maxChromaCases._note: TestMaxChromaSRGB_Blue: positive gamut capacity at DM blue anchor
TestMaxChromaSRGB_Extremes: meaningful capacity at mid lightness
